proven: Both repositories define the same evidence-gate direction: formal definition -> units -> model -> data -> uncertainty -> falsifier -> bounded claim.
RLL assigns cosmology/observables to itself and formal equations/gates to RafPolimata.
not_proven: No shared package or executable API is proven.
METHOD_DEFINED does not mean physical confirmation.
relationships.next_action: Emit one RLL experiment manifest using stable equation IDs and validate it in both repositories.
relationships.rollback: Revert only the bridge registry entry; keep both canonical documents unchanged.

proven: ChipQuantum defines a runtime evidence manifest with source hash, binary hash, compiler, flags, architecture, equation IDs and claim state.
RLL defines runtime, dataset, uncertainty, artifact-hash and verdict fields for experiment evidence.
not_proven: No ChipQuantum runtime artifact has been imported into RLL.
No ARM32/ARM64/x86_64 cross-architecture equivalence is proven by this registry.
Code compilation or determinism would not validate RLL physics.
relationships.next_action: Generate one bounded float64 reference run and one fixed-point run, then compare hashes, tolerances and overflow counters.
relationships.rollback: Remove the candidate import record; do not delete runtime evidence or negative results.

proven: Both repositories model claim -> repository -> path -> evidence -> test -> state -> next action.
Both preserve TOKEN_VAZIO and CONTRADICTION as valid states.
not_proven: No automatic GAIA ingestion of RLL artifacts is proven.
No shared canonical schema version is proven.
Hashing a record does not validate the scientific meaning of the record.
relationships.next_action: Define a one-way pointer-only import receipt for an RLL claim and reject payload mutation.
relationships.rollback: Delete only the import pointer after preserving the original RLL artifact and audit record.

proven: The architecture documents assign device/QEMU execution to Vectras and scientific interpretation to RLL.
Vectras explicitly marks the safe current stage as documentation-only and BETA_BLOCKED.
not_proven: No current APK hash, real-device smoke, QEMU boot evidence or RLL run inside Vectras is proven.
A documentation bridge is not a runtime bridge.
relationships.next_action: Produce current APK manifest and real-device smoke evidence before importing any Vectras result into RLL.
relationships.rollback: Keep Vectras stopped and images immutable; remove only the RLL pointer if evidence is invalid.

proven: The Termux fork has a pinned source-contract validator and explicit ARM ABI manifest fields.
RLL has a provenance ledger defining acceptable command, environment, input and output hash evidence.
not_proven: The current Termux fork does not prove that early RLL calculations ran on the author's phone.
No historical shell log or original mobile artifact chain is located.
A current source contract cannot retroactively establish historical provenance.
relationships.next_action: Locate one original figure or CSV and link command, environment, input hash, output hash and timestamp without rewriting history.
relationships.rollback: Revert any unsupported provenance promotion to DECLARED_BY_AUTHOR or TOKEN_VAZIO.

urgent_gaps.problem: The FASE17-20 snapshot records G4 as TOKEN_VAZIO while FASE22 later quantifies and closes it.
urgent_gaps.resolution: Preserve the historical snapshot status and attach a current-state overlay through FASE22.

urgent_gaps.problem: No external runtime manifest has yet been imported into the RLL evidence graph.
urgent_gaps.resolution: Import exactly one bounded, hashed runtime artifact before adding further runtime relationships.

urgent_gaps.problem: Historical mobile/Termux provenance is declared but lacks an original artifact chain.
urgent_gaps.resolution: Locate one original artifact and produce a non-retroactive provenance manifest.
